issues.message: Protected method handleRequestError is missing from data. This is the primary extension point for subclassing (overload signatures: handleRequestError<T>(response, request, retries, error): Promise<T> | unknown). The quickstart says AxiosWrapper is intended to be subclassed, so documenting this hook is important for users.

Data signature is 'constructor(options?: AxiosWrapperOptions)' but source is 'constructor(options: AxiosWrapperOptions = {})'. Functionally equivalent but technically different (default value vs optional marker).

Data signature shows 'options?: ApiMethodParams["options"]' but source uses 'options: ApiMethodParams["options"] = {}'. Same pattern applies to post, put, patch, delete, head methods. Default value vs optional marker.
Type RequestInfoToCollect is referenced in the collectRequest method parameter but is not re-exported from the package index (src/index.ts). Users cannot import this type directly.
Type CollectedRequestInfo is referenced in the getCollectedRequests return type but is not re-exported from the package index (src/index.ts). Users cannot import this type directly.
Type CollectorOptions is referenced as the type for AxiosWrapperOptions.collector but is not re-exported from the package index (src/index.ts). Users cannot import this type directly.
